message: Last winter, when the forecast called for a blizzard, I felt a flutter of excitement instead of dread. For once, I was ready! I had stocked up on snacks, filled the pantry with cozy comfort foods, and even dug out the board games. As the snow began to fall, I was sipping hot cocoa, feeling like the calm captain of my ship. It was such a relief to know I had everything we needed to hunker down and enjoy the moment rather than scramble at the last minute. It’s amazing how a little preparation can turn what used to be a stressful situation into a cozy family adventure! Have you ever felt that thrill of being the prepared one? ☕️❄️ This little refresher helped me feel even more ready!
